_comment: Hard disqualifiers. If ANY criterion is True for a site, the composite score is clamped to 0.0 and the site is flagged. Tunable per archetype; defaults below apply unless overridden.

in_fema_100yr_floodplain.description: Any portion of the parcel inside a FEMA 100-year (1% annual) floodplain.

no_transmission_within_15mi.description: No ≥230 kV transmission line within 15 miles.

no_fiber_within_25mi.description: No long-haul fiber route within 25 miles.

active_dc_moratorium.description: County or municipality has an active data-center moratorium ordinance.

zoning_forbids_data_center.description: Current zoning explicitly forbids data-center / heavy-industrial use AND no rezoning path is documented.

wet_bulb_p99_above_30c.description: ASHRAE p99 wet-bulb > 30°C makes evaporative cooling untenable without huge water spend.
